---
title: "Slovník statistických pojmů"
subtitle: "Biostatistika (MB120P163)"
lang: cs
date-modified: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-title: "Obsah"
    number-sections: false
    embed-resources: true
    theme: flatly
    code-fold: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(here)
library(yaml)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(stringi)
library(knitr)

here::i_am("slovnik_pojmu.qmd")

source(here::here("R/Functions", "get_sort_key.R"))
source(here::here("R/Functions", "format_field_as_markdown.R"))
source(here::here("R/Functions", "format_see_also.R"))
source(here::here("R/Functions", "render_glossary_entry.R"))
source(here::here("R/Functions", "get_first_letter.R"))
```

```{r}
#| label: nacti-data
#| echo: false
#| message: false

entries <-
  here::here("glossary_data.yaml") |>
  readr::read_file() |>
  yaml::yaml.load()

entries_sorted <-
  entries |>
  purrr::map(get_sort_key) |>
  purrr::map(
    .f = ~ {
      entry <-
        purrr::keep(
          entries, function(e) get_sort_key(e) == .x
        )
      entry[[1]]
    }
  )


```

```{r}
#| label: render-hesla
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| results: asis

letters_present <-
  purrr::map_chr(entries_sorted, get_first_letter) |>
  unique()

letters_present |>
  purrr::walk(
    .f = function(letter) {
      group <-
        purrr::keep(
          .x = entries_sorted,
          .p = function(e) get_first_letter(e) == letter
        )
      cat(paste0("\n## ", letter, "\n"))
      purrr::walk(
        .x = group,
        .f = function(entry) {
          cat(render_glossary_entry(entry, entries))
        }
      )
    }
  )
```
